title: cyperus celans
intro: Cyperus celans, also known as papyrus sedge or umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus celans include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling, relieve pain, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Cyperus celans can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat digestive issues, fever, and other ailments.
